blueprints.name: Pipeline Hygiene
blueprints.description: S3/S4 deals, unreviewed high-value deals, and stalled pipeline

subQueries.purpose: S3 and S4 deals in current quarter — baseline of active early-stage pipeline

subQueries.subQuestion: Show deals over 1M with no activity or review in the last 2 months
subQueries.purpose: High-value deals with no recent engagement — risk identification for large opportunities
Stalled deals (STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive') — pipeline that needs cleanup or action

blueprints.presentationHint: Synthesize as an action-oriented pipeline hygiene report. Structure: (1) Pipeline snapshot — summarize the S3/S4 landscape, (2) High-value risk — call out the 1M+ deals needing review, (3) Stalled pipeline — quantify and highlight deals requiring cleanup. End with 3-5 prioritized action items the manager should take this week.
suggestedFollowUps: Which stalled deals should I deprioritize?
Show me deal progression trends this quarter
What is the pipeline coverage for next quarter?
